rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Determining Prevailing Party On Appeal And Fixing Attorney'S Fees Recoverable As Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 20, 2023 line 1. RESPONDENT MARK EPSTEIN, SAMETC, LLC, SEILER EPSTEIN ZIEGLER & APPLEGATE, LLP Motion For Order Determining Prevailing Party On Appeal And Fixing Attorney'S Fees Recoverable As Costs is continued to October 24, 2023, pending appeal. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JRM FINANCIAL, LLC VS. OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LCC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 20, 2023 line 4. DEFENDANT OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LCC, TONY GARNICKI DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint states facts to support Plaintiff's claims regarding the despute that has arisen over the property ownership. Whether Plaintiff is or is not the owner of the entire parcel is an issue of fact to be determined by the trier of fact in this action. It is not properly subject of a demurrer. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities

PLAINTIFF LIANA TAHIR Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Parties are ordered to meet and confer at 8:30am the day of the hearing regarding compliance. Complete, verified responses without objections shall be provided within 5 days of notice of entry of order on this motion as to: (1) Form Interrogatories - General (Set One); (2) Form Interrogatories - Unlawful Detainer (Set One); (3) Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set One); and (4) Requests for Production of Documents and Tangible Things (Set One). Request for Admissions (Set One) are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $600. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
